name: Fission Uranium Corp.
content: Fission Uranium Corp. is a Canadian-based resource company specializing in the strategic exploration and development of the Patterson Lake South (PLS) uranium property in Saskatchewan's Athabasca Basin. The company is focused on advancing its high-grade Triple R deposit, which is one of the largest undeveloped uranium deposits in the region. Through disciplined engineering and environmental stewardship, Fission aims to become a leading supplier of uranium to the global nuclear energy market, supporting the transition to low-carbon power generation.
